TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType tag encoded as a packed 32-bit unsigned integer.

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The packed tag value with characters encoded as (byte)c1 << 24 | (byte)c2 << 16 | (byte)c3 << 8 | (byte)c4.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a raw packed value.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse (string? tag);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, a zero tag is returned. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are right-padded with spaces.
Docs.summary: Parses a string of up to four ASCII characters into an , padding with spaces if necessary.
Docs.returns: An whose characters correspond to the first four characters of .

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToString ();
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns the four-character string representation of the tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string with each character corresponding to one byte of the packed value.
